scope: TorchTitan DeepSeek-V4 Flash 4-layer current TileLang shared-KV low-intrusion bottleneck profile
why_4x_not_8x: GPUs 0-3 were occupied by an unrelated active TorchTitan/Qwen workload; the profile used idle GPUs 4-7 only.

run.local_wrapper_note: The local launcher wrapper stayed open after remote completion and was killed locally after verifying the remote run had completed and no matching remote process remained.

profile_knobs.read: This is lower-intrusion than the prior deep profile, but still synchronizes timing regions. Use it for bottleneck ranking, not as a promoted throughput baseline.

jit_read.read: Compile and data-race warning lines appeared before the step-1 metric. Steps 2-3 are the useful steady read for this run.

sharedkv_attention_local_read.read: The TileLang compressed-dKV body is useful locally at about 8.2 ms per call, but the current shared-KV backward bridge still pays route planning, materialized selected-KV/probs/grad-logits, separate dQ/QK/PV stages, and local scatter around it.

mori_moe_local_read.read: The MoE backward path remains larger than the sparse-attention TileLang slice. The core issue is local owner-rank VJP plus dX return skew/wait; combine_dx is still mostly arrival skew rather than raw combine math.

bottleneck_read: Step-level: backward dominates. Step 2 spends 11.55s of 16.40s in backward; step 3 spends 15.56s of 20.55s in backward.
MoE-level: MORI routed backward is the largest concrete timed subsystem. Local padded VJP is about 50.9 ms median per call and combine_dx about 20.9 ms median per call, with large rank-total skew.

Attention-level: TileLang is promising but not enough by itself. The selected-limit dKV body is about 8.2 ms per call, while the current bridge adds roughly another double-digit-ms envelope around it.
The TFLOPs drop from step 2 to step 3 is consistent with backward growth and memory growth, not with repeated TileLang compile after warmup.
next_actions: Keep TileLang for sparse attention, but move from final dKV-only replacement toward a fused/adjacent backward boundary that avoids materialized selected-KV, probs, and grad-logits HBM slabs.
Prioritize MoE backward for end-to-end TFLOPs: reduce padded local VJP recompute and wgrad/xgrad cost, then revisit dX return overlap once route identity is production-safe.
Run a longer no-heavy-profile durability pass after the next memory fix, because the step-3 TFLOPs drop and memory climb still make this path non-promoted.
Defer AsyncLL staged/flattened as a performance path until route-key identity is fixed; the existing S4096 artifacts mark it diagnostic-only.
commands: env TARGET_HOST=do-sonle5-mi350-gpu REMOTE_ROOT=/scratch/sonle5/dsv4_pretrain_canary_20260527 IMAGE=sonle5/nexus-titan-rocm722-mori-tilelang:20260604 RUN_ID=torchtitan_dsv4_tilelang_current_lowintrusion_profile_4x_s4096_gbs64_steps3_20260604 GPUS_PER_NODE=4 CANARY_VISIBLE_DEVICES=4,5,6,7 CANARY_EP=4 CANARY_GBS=64 CANARY_STEPS=3 CANARY_CHECKPOINT_ENABLE=false CANARY_ACTIVATION_CHECKPOINT_MODE=full CANARY_SPARSE_MLA_MAX_SEQ_LEN=4096 CANARY_SPARSE_MLA_BACKWARD_MODE=shared_kv CANARY_SPARSE_MLA_KERNEL_MODULE=torchtitan.models.deepseek_v4.sparse_mla_shared_kv_triton_forward_backend CANARY_SHAREDKV_BACKWARD_MODE=explicit_tilelang_dkv CANARY_SHAREDKV_TILELANG_DKV_BACKEND=selected_limit_hsk_bf16_scaled_source CANARY_LI_KL_BACKEND=triton_tl_dot CANARY_MOE_COMM_BACKEND=mori CANARY_EXPERIMENTAL_MORI_AITER_MOE=true CANARY_MORI_AITER_BACKWARD_MODE=routed CANARY_MORI_AITER_LOCAL_VJP_MODE=padded CANARY_MORI_AITER_LOCAL_VJP_SWIGLU_BACKEND=triton CANARY_MORI_AITER_BACKWARD_COMBINE_INPUT_MODE=registered CANARY_MORI_SHMEM_HEAP_SIZE=32G CANARY_PYTORCH_CUDA_ALLOC_CONF=expandable_segments:True CANARY_PYTORCH_ALLOC_CONF=expandable_segments:True CANARY_DSV4_PROFILE_TIMING_PATH=/scratch/sonle5/dsv4_pretrain_canary_20260527/outputs/torchtitan_dsv4_tilelang_current_lowintrusion_profile_4x_s4096_gbs64_steps3_20260604/profiling/profile_timing CANARY_MORI_AITER_TIMING_PATH=/scratch/sonle5/dsv4_pretrain_canary_20260527/outputs/torchtitan_dsv4_tilelang_current_lowintrusion_profile_4x_s4096_gbs64_steps3_20260604/profiling/mori_timing CANARY_DSV4_ADDITIVE_TIMING_PATH=/scratch/sonle5/dsv4_pretrain_canary_20260527/outputs/torchtitan_dsv4_tilelang_current_lowintrusion_profile_4x_s4096_gbs64_steps3_20260604/profiling/additive_timing.jsonl experiments/2026-05-27-deepseek-v4-amd-pretrain/launchers/torchtitan_direct_deepseek_v4_4x8xmi350_canary.sh run
